collectors.title: Database
collectors.titleDetails: (8 total Queries, 8 of them unique across 1 Connection)

queries.sql: INSERT INTO `announcements` (`title`, `content`, `created_by`, `recipient_user_id`, `recipient_role`, `category`, `related_shift_id`, `created_at`) VALUES ('Inasistencia detectada', 'Elluz Andreina no registró asistencia para el turno \"Madrugada\" programado del 16/04/2026 01:00 al 16/04/2026 07:00.', 1, NULL, 'admin', 'absence_notice', 3, '2026-04-18 16:14:17')

SELECT `announcements`.*, `authors`.`name` as `author_name`, `recipients`.`name` as `recipient_name`, `shifts`.`start_time` as `shift_start_time`, `shifts`.`end_time` as `shift_end_time`, `schedules`.`name` as `schedule_name`, `shift_users`.`name` as `shift_user_name` FROM `announcements` LEFT JOIN `users` as `authors` ON `authors`.`id` = `announcements`.`created_by` LEFT JOIN `users` as `recipients` ON `recipients`.`id` = `announcements`.`recipient_user_id` LEFT JOIN `shifts` ON `shifts`.`id` = `announcements`.`related_shift_id` LEFT JOIN `schedules` ON `schedules`.`id` = `shifts`.`schedule_id` LEFT JOIN `users` as `shift_users` ON `shift_users`.`id` = `shifts`.`user_id` ORDER BY `announcements`.`created_at` DESC

timelineData.query: INSERT INTO `announcements` (`title`, `content`, `created_by`, `recipient_user_id`, `recipient_role`, `category`, `related_shift_id`, `created_at`) VALUES ('Inasistencia detectada', 'Elluz Andreina no registró asistencia para el turno \"Madrugada\" programado del 16/04/2026 01:00 al 16/04/2026 07:00.', 1, NULL, 'admin', 'absence_notice', 3, '2026-04-18 16:14:17')

timelineData.name: Query
timelineData.query: SELECT `announcements`.*, `authors`.`name` as `author_name`, `recipients`.`name` as `recipient_name`, `shifts`.`start_time` as `shift_start_time`, `shifts`.`end_time` as `shift_end_time`, `schedules`.`name` as `schedule_name`, `shift_users`.`name` as `shift_user_name` FROM `announcements` LEFT JOIN `users` as `authors` ON `authors`.`id` = `announcements`.`created_by` LEFT JOIN `users` as `recipients` ON `recipients`.`id` = `announcements`.`recipient_user_id` LEFT JOIN `shifts` ON `shifts`.`id` = `announcements`.`related_shift_id` LEFT JOIN `schedules` ON `schedules`.`id` = `shifts`.`schedule_id` LEFT JOIN `users` as `shift_users` ON `shift_users`.`id` = `shifts`.`user_id` ORDER BY `announcements`.`created_at` DESC
